ON BEHALF OF THE AK PARTY GROUP, MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Tokat) - Mr. President, dear members of parliament; I took the floor on behalf of our AK Party Group on our Bill on Amendments to the Turkish Penal Code and Some Laws, known publicly as the "eleventh judicial package". I respectfully salute the General Assembly and our beloved nation.
Dear MPs, "justice", as one of the most ancient concepts in human history, is the most fundamental value that ensures the protection of people's rights, social order and the legitimacy of the state. During the AK PARTY governments, the necessary regulations at the legal level were made available to our citizens over time in order to establish the rule of law and to ensure a fair and effective legal system, both to improve the problematic aspects and to make the system work faster and more effectively. Undoubtedly, we will continue our work in this direction with determination in the future.
Dear MPs, with a participatory approach, by taking the opinions of practicing judges and prosecutors, bar association representatives, academics, non-governmental organizations and many stakeholders.
In the 4th Judicial Reform Strategy Document prepared by our Ministry of Justice and announced by our President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan on January 23, 2025, the vision of a prompt and predictable justice system based on the rule of law was highlighted in line with the goal of "Turkey's Century is the Century of Justice". With the new Judicial Reform Strategy Document, which is a continuation and complement of the previous reform documents, covering the period 2025-2029 and containing 5 objectives, 45 targets and 264 activities, further strengthening the independence and impartiality of the judiciary, strengthening legal security, completing trials in a reasonable time, creating a solution-centered and predictable justice system, increasing efficiency by simplifying trial procedures, increasing trust and satisfaction in the judiciary, disseminating restorative and compensatory justice practices, criminal justice. It is aimed to strengthen the effectiveness and deterrence of the system. In our bill prepared on the basis of the 4th Judicial Reform Strategy Document, we envisage implementing regulations that directly affect human life.
Mr. President, dear MPs; This bill, which we have prepared carefully, foresees changes and regulations in 12 different laws and consists of a total of 38 articles, including enforcement and enforcement. In the proposal, very important regulations are aimed at preventing crime, especially ensuring execution justice, providing deterrence, fighting more effectively against actions that disrupt traffic order, ensuring the safety of people's lives and property in traffic, and strengthening social peace.
is located. Now, I would like to give you information about the regulations in the proposal.
Dear MPs, the fight against criminal organizations is of vital importance in ensuring the rule of law and social peace. As AK PARTY, we have been waging a determined, uninterrupted and multi-dimensional fight against organized crime structures since the day we came to power.

With our work, we have implemented legal regulations targeting the formation, financing and areas of activity of criminal organizations. Updating the criminal legislation, confiscating proceeds of crime and accelerating judicial processes are the main topics of these studies. Our goal is to make permanent a legal order that reinforces our citizens' trust in justice and never gives space to criminal organizations. We have done everything necessary to prevent our youth from surrendering to the shadow of criminal organizations. We have collapsed many organizations one by one with our comprehensive fight against criminal organizations for twenty-three years, and we will continue our fight on this issue with determination. Today, we see that gangs engage in activities that disrupt social peace and security against our citizens, especially our youth.
With the proposal, we are making important regulations in terms of combating criminal organizations. In this context, with the regulation made in the 220th article of the Turkish Penal Code, it is accepted that the punishment to be given to the leaders of the organization will be increased from half to 1 times if children are used as tools in crimes committed within the scope of organizational activities. In addition, the lower and upper limits of prison sentences for the crimes of establishing, managing, or being a member of an organization are being increased. Accordingly, the penalty for the crime of establishing and managing an organization is five to ten years' imprisonment, and the upper limit of the penalty for the crime of membership in an organization is five years' imprisonment.
It is determined as . Additionally, if the organization is armed, the penalty will be increased by half. We will act determinedly today as we did yesterday and continue to crush the heads of criminal gangs, no one should doubt that.
Dear friends, with the proposal we are making important regulations to prevent crime and strengthen social peace. In recent years, it has been observed that there has been an increase in tragic incidents where people are shot with firearms or weapons that fire sound and gas cartridges in places where they are gathered together, and people are injured or lose their lives. Due to these irresponsible behaviors, innocent lives are lost and stoves are extinguished. It is not in our tradition to fire shots into the air on people's happy days. We do not want people's joys to cause the pain of others. A moment of carelessness causes irreversible consequences. In this sense, with a gradual regulation, a rating was made between firearms and weapons that fire sound and gas cartridges, and penalties were increased compared to the previous regulation. Shooting with firearms in a residential area will be punishable by imprisonment from one to five years; If the same act is committed with weapons that fire sound or gas cartridges, a prison sentence of six months to three years will be imposed. It is envisaged that if this crime is committed in places where people gather together, such as weddings, engagements, military send-offs, etc., the penalty will be increased by half. It has been accepted that in this qualified case, the expedited trial procedure will not be applied and a public lawsuit will be filed directly.

It is foreseen that a person who stops a vehicle or prevents it from moving in an unlawful manner will be sentenced to imprisonment from one to three years.
In recent days, arguments in traffic and actions that cause transportation vehicles to be blocked and stopped endanger traffic safety and cause people to be injured or killed. In our proposal, blocking traffic is regulated as a separate crime and heavy sanctions are determined for these acts. In this way, we ensure that deterrent penalties are given to city bandits for their acts of aggression in traffic, which threaten the safety of people's lives and property, and we solve another problem that our citizens face.
Serious increases in the number of vehicles on the road lead to negative consequences as a result of accidents caused by people's behavior contrary to their obligations of care and attention. The aim of the proposal is to ensure that people show the necessary care and attention while performing their actions by increasing the penalty amounts for the crime of negligent injury. Accordingly, the penalty for a simple crime is four months to two years' imprisonment, and in case of causing injury to more than one person, the penalty is nine months to five years' imprisonment.
In order to prevent the victimization and weakness in the fight against crime due to actions such as not returning rental vehicles, changing their parts or using them in crimes, which have increased in recent years, the penalty to be imposed is increased by one fold if the subject of the crime of breach of trust is a motor land, sea or air vehicle. For this crime, a prison sentence of two to fourteen years may be imposed. It has been accepted that the conciliation provisions will not be applied in this newly introduced qualified situation.
Dear MPs, you are hurting our citizens with the proposal.
We are making regulations regarding cyber crimes and mobile lines in order to combat fraud more strongly and prevent these acts. In this context, in crimes committed through the use of information systems, the relevant bank account is allowed to be suspended by banks and financial institutions for up to forty-eight hours. Subsequently, the relevant interest may be seized by the judicial authorities without the requirement of obtaining a report specified in Article 128 of the Code of Criminal Procedure.
It is accepted that electronic payment institutions cannot open an account without verification with biometric methods such as photo, face recognition or fingerprint, or with identity documents that have electronic identity verification capability. Again, it is envisaged that GSM subscription can only be made with identity documents that have electronic identity verification capability, such as a chip identity card.
The Information Technologies and Communication Authority is allowed to impose limits on the number of lines that can be opened on behalf of a real or legal person. Electronic communication service will not be provided to mobile phones that are detected to be using more than the specified number of mobile communication lines.

Operators are obliged to periodically check the phone lines belonging to deceased persons, persons whose legal entities have expired, and foreigners who have left the country, every three months, and to close down the inactive ones. Regulations are being made to ensure the allocation and use of numbers specific to foreign nationals. In case of non-compliance with the provisions, it is envisaged that administrative fines will be imposed on GSM operators and relevant businesses.
Fraud, theft and misuse of debit or credit cards
Network connections of telephone lines detected to be used may be disconnected.
It is possible to impose administrative fines on banks, financial institutions and line operators if the information and documents requested by the public prosecutor, judge or court within the scope of an investigation or prosecution are not sent physically or electronically within ten days.
Any financial burden that may arise from updating people's subscription records or shutting down their phone lines when they take over their phone lines will not be reflected on the line owners.
Mr. President, dear MPs; The proposal also includes some regulations in order to fill the legal gap created by the annulment decisions given by the Constitutional Court and to eliminate any hesitations that may be experienced in practice.
Crimes of insult to face and in absentia are included in the scope of prepayment. With Law No. 7531, insult crimes committed mostly through social media were included in the scope of prepayment, and the Constitutional Court made an evaluation on the issue; Accordingly, we include the crime of face-to-face and in absentia within the scope of pre-payment, as well as insult crimes committed with an audio, written and video message, which are currently within the scope of pre-payment. Prepayment provisions will not be applied for existing files where conciliation has been achieved, and existing files where conciliation has not been achieved will be concluded with prepayment provisions.
Regulations regarding blocking access or removing content are made in Law No. 5651.
Legal certainty and predictability are provided in the disciplinary provisions of lawyers. The Constitutional Court annulled Articles 134 and 135 of the Law on Lawyers, and the practices and professional rules that had been going on for years in line with the opinions of the Union of Turkish Bar Associations.
It is clarified at the law level that which sanctions will be applied to which actions based on the law. Additionally, detailed regulations are made regarding recidivism and statute of limitations in terms of disciplinary provisions.
In case of complaints filed against the Public Procurement Authority, regulations are made regarding the refund of the application fee to the applicant, depending on whether it is justified.
Dear friends, the proposal also includes regulations to solve some problems in practice. In this context, trials of fraud crimes regulated in Article 158 of the Turkish Penal Code are ensured to be heard in criminal courts of first instance instead of high criminal courts.

Thus, it is envisaged that by ensuring specialization, the trials regarding these crimes will be concluded within a reasonable time and these crimes can be fought more effectively. Existing qualified fraud files that are in the prosecution phase will continue to be handled by high criminal courts.
Regulations are being made to prevent mentally ill patients who commit crimes from participating in social life without being rehabilitated. In this context, it is accepted that partially mentally ill patients should serve their sentences in the penal institution, and that security measures specific to mentally ill patients should be imposed on these people. Since the period that mentally ill patients will spend in a health institution for treatment and protection is indefinite and very short, it is accepted that this period cannot be less than one year for crimes requiring aggravated life imprisonment and life imprisonment, and six months for crimes requiring a prison sentence of more than ten years.
The scope of the reversal authority of regional courts of justice is being expanded.
Termination of the tender
In order to prevent the abuse of the right to request, it is regulated that if termination of the tender is requested by persons other than those listed in the Execution and Bankruptcy Law, the court will definitely reject this request on the file, and in cases where termination of the tender is requested by not paying the fee or security at all or by paying it incompletely, the request will be rejected definitively if the fee or security is not completed within the certain period given by the court.
Regulations are made to allow the proof of the contrary of the gracious savings made by the debtor with some of his close relatives, which are accepted as forgiveness without the possibility of proof of the contrary.
In order to alleviate the public debt burden of citizens who cannot pay their compulsory general health insurance premium debts and to facilitate their access to health services, the collection of primary and secondary general health insurance premium debts dating back to before 2016 is waived.
Regulations are made regarding the determination of price tariffs and periods for goods and services produced by tradesmen and craftsmen, as well as the formation and evaluation process of the conciliation commission.
As you all know, due to the pandemic that started in 2020, precautions have been taken against the risks that may occur in penal institutions and some execution arrangements have been made. Again, with the regulation made in the Execution Law in 2023, some opportunities were given to convicts in penal institutions as of July 31, 2023, in terms of earlier release and probation. This regulation, popularly known as the "Covid-19 regulation", has been subject to some criticism. It's like this:
Even if it was committed on the same date, people whose sentences became final and execution began as a result of the speedy trial benefited from this regulation, while those who were not in prison did not benefit. With this proposal, we are reconsidering the Covid-19 regulation in a way that will eliminate the grievances that have occurred in order to ensure execution justice.

As of 31/7/2023, convicts in closed penal institutions can benefit from the arrangement of earlier transfer to open penal institution or probation. Those who were convicted for crimes committed on or before 31/7/2023 can benefit. Accordingly, for crimes committed on or before 31/7/2023, it is possible to be transferred to an open penal institution three years earlier and to probation three years earlier.
I hope that the proposal will be beneficial for our country and nation, and I respectfully greet the General Assembly. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Tokat) - Sayın Başkan, değerli milletvekilleri; Genel Kurulu saygıyla selamlıyorum.

Şerafettin Can Atalay, Gezi Parkı eylemleri kapsamında yapılan soruşturma ve devamındaki yargılama neticesinde İstanbul 13. Asliye Ceza Mahkemesi tarafından...

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Asliye mi?

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (İstanbul) - Asliye de olur, Asliye de(!)

MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Devamla) - Ağır Ceza Mahkemesi tarafından on sekiz yıl hapis cezasıyla mahkûm edilmiştir.

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Sulh ceza bile verir sizde(!)

MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Devamla) - İstinaf kararı hukuka uygun bulunmuş, Yargıtay 3. Ceza Dairesinde karar onanmıştır. Yargıtay, on sekiz yıl hapis cezasını da az bulmuş, zanlının...

GÜLÜSTAN KILIÇ KOÇYİĞİT (Kars) - Ne zanlısı ya, bir milletvekili ya.

MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Devamla) - ...müebbet hapisle cezalandırılması gerektiği hâlde aleyhe temyiz olmadığından on sekiz yıl hapis cezasıyla cezalandırılması gerektiğine karar vermiştir.

GÜLÜSTAN KILIÇ KOÇYİĞİT (Kars) - Sayın Başkan, bir milletvekili için "zanlı" ifadesini kullanamaz.

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - "Milletvekilinin" diyeceksin.

GÜLÜSTAN KILIÇ KOÇYİĞİT (Kars) - Bir milletvekili burada, bir milletvekili için "zanlı" kavramı kullanılamaz, kabul etmiyoruz.

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Zanlı siz oluyorsunuz, siz.

MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Devamla) - Tabii, bu karar derecattan geçip kesinleştikten sonra Anayasa Mahkemesi hak ihlaline karar vermiş, dosyayı yeniden ele alan 3. Ceza Dairesi önceki kararda ısrar etmiştir, ihlal kararının gerekçelerini de gerekçeli kararda ayrıntılı bir şekilde açıklamıştır. Yargıtay 3. Ceza Dairesi Can Atalay'ın milletvekilliğinin düşürülmesi için gerekli işlemlere başlanmak üzere de dosyayı Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisi Başkanlığına göndermiştir. Yargıtay ve Anayasa Mahkemesi Anayasa'nın 14'üncü maddesinin yorumunda farklı görüşler ortaya koymuştur. Türkiye Cumhuriyeti devleti bir hukuk devletidir, Anayasa'nın 138'inci maddesinde "Hâkimler, görevlerinde bağımsızdırlar; Anayasaya, kanuna ve hukuka uygun olarak vicdanî kanaatlerine göre hüküm verirler." Yine, Anayasa'nın 146'ncı maddesinde "Yüksek mahkemeler" üst başlığı altında Anayasa Mahkemesi, Yargıtay ve Danıştay şeklinde yüksek mahkemeler sıralanmıştır.

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (İstanbul) - Konuya da gelirsek bir zahmet...

GÜLÜSTAN KILIÇ KOÇYİĞİT (Kars) - Bu daha giriş.

MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Devamla) - Bunların kuruluş ve işleyişine ilişkin hükümler Anayasa'da belirlenmiştir. Burada şu hususu arz etmekte fayda vardır: Anayasa'da yüksek mahkemeler belirlenirken aralarında bir hiyerarşi öngörülmemiştir, tamamı aynı başlık altında yüksek mahkeme olarak belirlenmiştir. Yüksek mahkemeler arasında bir ast-üst ilişkisi yoktur. Anayasa'mızın 153'üncü maddesi Anayasa Mahkemesi kararlarıyla ilgili hükümleri düzenlerken Anayasa'nın 154'üncü maddesi de Yargıtayın adliye mahkemelerince verilen ve başka bir adli yargı mercisine bırakılmadığı karar ve hükümlerin son inceleme mercisi olduğunu açıkça ortaya koymuştur.

GÜLÜSTAN KILIÇ KOÇYİĞİT (Kars) - 158/3 ne diyor? 158/3 neyi düzenliyor Sayın Vekil?

MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Devamla) - Yine, Meclis İçtüzüğü'nün 49'uncu maddesi Meclis gündemini düzenlemiştir. "Gündem.

Türkiye Büyük Millet Meclisi Genel Kurulunun gündemi şu kısımlardan ibarettir: 1.Başkanlığın Genel Kurula sunuşları. 2.Özel gündemde yer alacak işler. 3.Seçim. 4.Oylaması yapılacak işler. 5.Meclis soruşturması raporları." şeklinde devam etmiştir.

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (İstanbul) - Ya, yazıyor burada, yazıyor burada bak, yazıyor onlar, yazıyor burada. Ya, zamanını kullanma, bırak eğer konuşacak bir şey kalmadıysa.

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Sen ne anlatıyorsun?

MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Devamla) - Meclis gündemi açıktır.

(Mikrofon otomatik cihaz tarafından kapatıldı)

BAŞKAN - Sayın Arslan, lütfen tamamlayın.

MAHMUT TANAL (İstanbul) - Tamamladı zaten.

GÜLÜSTAN KILIÇ KOÇYİĞİT (Kars) - Sayın Başkan... Anayasa kitabı hepimizde var.

MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Devamla) - Başkanlığın Mecliste sunuşu olmuştur. Başkanlığın sunuşu Meclis İçtüzüğü'ne ve Meclis teamüllerine uygundur.
records.englishTranslation:
MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Tokat) - Mr. President, dear members of parliament; I respectfully greet the General Assembly.

Şerafettin Can Atalay was sentenced by the Istanbul 13th Criminal Court of First Instance as a result of the investigation and subsequent trial within the scope of the Gezi Park protests...

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - Asliye?

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (Istanbul) - It can be the first instance, it can also be the first instance(!)

MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Continued) - He was sentenced to eighteen years in prison by the High Criminal Court.

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - The peace even gives punishment to you (!)

MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Continue) - The appeal decision was found to be lawful, and the decision was approved in the 3rd Criminal Chamber of the Supreme Court of Appeals. The Supreme Court found the eighteen-year prison sentence to be too low, and...

GÜLÜSTAN KILIÇ KOÇYİĞİT (Kars) - What a suspect, a member of parliament.

MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Continued) - ...decided that he should be sentenced to life imprisonment, but since there was no appeal against him, he should be sentenced to eighteen years' imprisonment.

GÜLÜSTAN KILIÇ KOÇYİĞİT (Kars) - Mr. President, he cannot use the term "suspect" for a member of parliament.

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - You will say "the member of parliament".

GÜLÜSTAN KILIÇ KOÇYİĞİT (Kars) - A member of parliament is here, the concept of "suspect" cannot be used for a member of parliament, we do not accept it.

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - You are the suspect, you.

MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Continue) - Of course, after this decision went through and became final, the Constitutional Court decided that there was a violation of rights, the 3rd Criminal Chamber, which re-examined the file, insisted on the previous decision, and explained the reasons for the violation decision in detail in the reasoned decision. The 3rd Criminal Chamber of the Supreme Court of Appeals sent the file to the Presidency of the Grand National Assembly of Türkiye to begin the necessary procedures to reduce Can Atalay's membership in parliament. The Supreme Court and the Constitutional Court have expressed different opinions in the interpretation of Article 14 of the Constitution. The Republic of Türkiye is a state of law. Article 138 of the Constitution states that "Judges are independent in their duties; they make decisions according to their conscientious convictions in accordance with the Constitution, the law and the law." Again, in Article 146 of the Constitution, high courts are listed under the heading "High Courts" as the Constitutional Court, the Supreme Court and the Council of State.

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN (Istanbul) - Coming to the topic, it is a problem...

GÜLÜSTAN KILIÇ KOÇYİĞİT (Kars) - This is just the introduction.

MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Continue) - Provisions regarding their establishment and operation are determined in the Constitution. It is useful to point out the following here: When determining the high courts in the Constitution, there is no hierarchy among them, all of them are designated as high courts under the same title. There is no superior-subordinate relationship between high courts. While Article 153 of our Constitution regulates the provisions regarding the decisions of the Constitutional Court, Article 154 of the Constitution clearly states that the Supreme Court of Appeals is the final review authority of the decisions and judgments given by the courts of justice and not left to another judicial authority.

GÜLÜSTAN KILIÇ KOÇYİĞİT (Kars) - What does 158/3 say? What does 158/3 regulate, Mr. Deputy?

MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Continue) - Again, Article 49 of the Assembly Internal Regulations regulates the Assembly agenda. “Agenda.

The agenda of the General Assembly of the Grand National Assembly of Türkiye consists of the following parts: 1. Presentations of the Presidency to the General Assembly. 2.Things that will be included in the special agenda. 3rd Election. 4. Works to be voted on. 5.Parliamentary investigation reports." continued as follows.

GÖKHAN GÜNAYDIN ​​(Istanbul) - Oh, it's written here, it's written here, look, they're writing, it's written here. Well, don't waste your time, leave it alone if there's nothing left to talk about.

ALİ MAHİR BAŞARIR (Mersin) - What are you talking about?

MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Continue) - The agenda of the parliament is clear.

(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)

CHAIRMAN - Mr. Arslan, please complete.

MAHMUT TANAL (Istanbul) - It has already been completed.

GÜLÜSTAN KILIÇ KOÇYİĞİT (Kars) - Mr. President... We all have the Constitution book.

MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Continued) - The Presidency's presentation was made in the Parliament. The Presidency's presentation is in accordance with the Internal Regulations of the Assembly and the practices of the Assembly.

metadata.Konu: Oturum Başkanı TBMM Başkan Vekili Sırrı Süreyya Önder'in, 143 sıra sayılı Kanun Teklifi'nin Anayasa'ya aykırı olup olmamasıyla ilgili tutumu hakkında usul görüşmesi münasebetiyle

records.originalTurkish:
MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Tokat) - Sayın Başkan, değerli milletvekilleri; Genel Kurulu saygıyla selamlıyorum.

Geçen dönemde, 27'nci Dönemde 7354 sayılı Öğretmenlik Meslek Kanunu'nu çıkarmıştık. Bu kanunun iki maddesinde kısmi iptaller oldu. Anayasa Mahkemesinin iptal kararıyla aday öğretmenlik uygulaması, öğretmenlik kariyer basamaklarını uygulamalarıyla ilgili iptaller vardı. Hem bu iptalle oluşan boşlukları karşılamak üzere hem de öğretmenlerimizin ve kamuoyunun beklentilerini karşılayacak bir kanun teklifini Meclis huzuruna getirdik. Kanun teklifimiz Meclis Başkanlığına sunuldu. Meclis Başkanlığına sunulduğu zaman Meclis Başkanlığımız kanun teklifimizin Anayasa'ya uygunluğuyla ilgili incelemeleri yaptı.

SİBEL SUİÇMEZ (Trabzon) - Öğretmenlerin hepsi karşı, sendikalar karşı.

MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Devamla) - Anayasa'ya aykırı bir durum bulunmadığından teklifimiz...

MURAT EMİR (Ankara) - Komisyon bakmadı, Komisyon bakmadı.

GÜLÜSTAN KILIÇ KOÇYİĞİT (Kars) - Bir öncekini de incelemiştiniz, bir öncekini de incelemiştiniz ama Anayasa Mahkemesinden döndü.

MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Devamla) - ...Millî Eğitim Komisyonuna esas komisyon olarak, Adalet Komisyonu ve Plan ve Bütçe Komisyonuna da tali komisyon olarak havale edildi. Millî Eğitim Komisyonumuz kanun teklifi üzerinde uzun bir görüşme süreci yönetti. Anayasa'ya aykırılık iddiası burada da gündeme geldi. Anayasa'ya aykırılıkla ilgili iddialar burada detaylıca tartışıldı ve getirilen teklifte Anayasa'ya aykırı bir durum olmadığı görüldü. Bu konu karara bağlandı.

Yine, grup önerimizle beraber teklifimizin Meclis gündemine alınması bugün kabul edildi ve Genel Kurulun kararıyla bu konunun görüşülmesine karar verildi. Biz getirdiğimiz teklifte Anayasa'ya aykırı bir durum olmadığı kanaatindeyiz. Kaldı ki böyle bir durum Genel Kurulun gündemine geldikten sonra görüşülemez. Bu konu, tabii, her zaman yargı denetimine açıktır.

GÜLÜSTAN KILIÇ KOÇYİĞİT (Kars) - Her aşamada Anayasa'ya aykırılık ileri sürülür, İç Tüzük'te var, her aşamada Anayasa'ya aykırılık ileri sürülür Sayın Vekil.

MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Devamla) - Biz, bu konuda Anayasa'ya aykırı bir durum olmadığı kanaatindeyiz.
records.englishTranslation:
MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Tokat) - Mr. President, dear members of parliament; I respectfully greet the General Assembly.

Last term, in the 27th Term, we enacted the Teaching Profession Law No. 7354. There were partial cancellations in two articles of this law. With the annulment decision of the Constitutional Court, there were cancellations regarding candidate teacher practice and teaching career stages. We brought before the Parliament a bill to meet the gaps created by this cancellation and to meet the expectations of our teachers and the public. Our bill was presented to the Speaker of the Parliament. When it was submitted to the Presidency of the Parliament, our Presidency examined the constitutionality of our bill.

SİBEL SUİÇMEZ (Trabzon) - All teachers are against, unions are against.

MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Continue) - Since there is no situation contrary to the Constitution, our proposal...

MURAT EMİR (Ankara) - The Commission did not look, the Commission did not look.

GÜLÜSTAN KILIÇ KOÇYİĞİT (Kars) - You examined the previous one, you also examined the previous one, but it was rejected by the Constitutional Court.

MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Continue) - ...it was transferred to the National Education Commission as the main commission, and to the Justice Commission and the Planning and Budget Commission as secondary commissions. Our National Education Commission conducted a long discussion process on the bill. The allegation of unconstitutionality was brought to the agenda here, too. Allegations regarding unconstitutionality were discussed in detail here and it was seen that there was nothing unconstitutional in the proposed proposal. This matter has been decided.

Again, it was accepted today that our proposal, together with our group proposal, should be included in the agenda of the Assembly, and it was decided to discuss this issue with the decision of the General Assembly. We are of the opinion that there is nothing unconstitutional in the proposal we have made. Moreover, such a situation cannot be discussed after it comes to the agenda of the General Assembly. This issue, of course, is always open to judicial review.

GÜLÜSTAN KILIÇ KOÇYİĞİT (Kars) - Unconstitutionality is claimed at every stage, it is in the Internal Regulation, unconstitutionality is claimed at every stage, Mr. Deputy.

MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Continuing) - We are of the opinion that there is nothing contrary to the Constitution on this issue.

records.title: Oturum Başkanı TBMM Başkan Vekili Bekir Bozdağ'ın, 160 sıra sayılı Kanun Teklifi'nin Anayasa'ya aykırı olup olmadığı gerekçesiyle ilgili tutumu hakkında usul görüşmesi münasebetiyle

fields.Subject: Oturum Başkanı TBMM Başkan Vekili Bekir Bozdağ'ın, 160 sıra sayılı Kanun Teklifi'nin Anayasa'ya aykırı olup olmadığı gerekçesiyle ilgili tutumu hakkında usul görüşmesi münasebetiyle

metadata.Konu: Oturum Başkanı TBMM Başkan Vekili Bekir Bozdağ'ın, 160 sıra sayılı Kanun Teklifi'nin Anayasa'ya aykırı olup olmadığı gerekçesiyle ilgili tutumu hakkında usul görüşmesi münasebetiyle

records.originalTurkish:
MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Tokat) - Sayın Başkan, değerli milletvekilleri; usul tartışmasında lehte söz aldım. Genel Kurulu ve aziz milletimizi saygıyla selamlıyorum.

160 sıra sayılı Kanun Teklifi Meclis Başkanlığına sunulduğunda Meclis Başkanlığımız Kanunlar ve Kararlar Başkanlığına bu teklifi iletti. Kanunlar ve Kararlar Başkanlığı teklifin Anayasa'ya aykırı olup olmadığı konusunda bir değerlendirme yaptı. Bu değerlendirmenin akabinde de teklif, Meclis Başkanlığı tarafından esas komisyon olarak Tarım, Orman ve Köyişleri Komisyonu Başkanlığına havale edildi. Bunun yanında, tali komisyon olarak da Çevre Komisyonuna, Adalet Komisyonuna ve İçişleri Komisyonuna havale edildi. Esas komisyon olan Tarım, Orman ve Köyişleri Komisyonunda Anayasa'ya aykırılıkla ilgili 2 adet önerge verildi. İç Tüzük'ün 38'inci maddesine göre de Anayasa'ya aykırılık iddiaları Komisyon çalışmalarında müzakere edildi.

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (İstanbul) - Müzakere edecek yeterlilikte bir birey yoktu Komisyonda.

MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Devamla) - Yapılan müzakereler neticesinde, teklif Anayasa'ya aykırı olmadığından, Anayasa'nın metnine ve ruhuna aykırı olmadığından önergeler reddedildi; bu husus komisyon raporunun 17'nci sayfasında da açık olarak ifade edilmiş, komisyon raporu milletvekillerimize dağıtılmıştır.

Esas itibarıyla, Anayasa'ya aykırılıkla ilgili kanun görüşmelerinde üç aşamalı bir değerlendirme var: Birincisi, Kanunlar ve Kararlar Başkanlığı tarafından yapılan değerlendirme; ikincisi, Komisyon Başkanlığı tarafından yapılan değerlendirme; üçüncüsü de kanunun maddeleri görüşülürken İç Tüzük'ün 84'üncü maddesine göre verilecek önergeler yoluyla yapılacak değerlendirme. İç Tüzük'ün 84'üncü maddesine göre maddelerin Anayasa'ya aykırı olduğu iddia edilirse öncelikle diğer önergeler ele alınmadan bu konuyu Meclis Başkan Vekilimiz oylamaya sunacak.

Bunun dışında, bizim önergemiz gündemde olmadığı için 27 Temmuz tarihli grup önerimiz de -Danışma Kurulu toplanamadığından- Meclis Başkanlığına sunuldu. Meclis Başkanlığı 110'uncu Birleşimde Meclis Genel Kurulunun önerimiz hakkındaki kararıyla kanun teklifini gündemin 1'inci sırasına aldı. Dolayısıyla, bu aşamadan sonra kanun teklifinin Anayasa'ya aykırılığı konusunda bir değerlendirme yapılması mümkün değil. Değerlendirme, sadece bu aşamadan sonra, 84'üncü maddeye göre yapılabilir ve bunun dışında da kanun teklifi yasalaştıktan sonra Anayasa Mahkemesinde soyut norm denetimi ve somut norm denetimi yoluyla yapılabilir.
records.englishTranslation:
MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Tokat) - Mr. President, dear members of parliament; I spoke in favor of the procedural debate. I respectfully salute the General Assembly and our beloved nation.

When the Bill No. 160 was presented to the Presidency of the Parliament, our Presidency forwarded this proposal to the Presidency of Laws and Decisions. The Presidency of Laws and Decisions made an evaluation as to whether the proposal was unconstitutional. Following this evaluation, the proposal was transferred by the Presidency of the Parliament to the Agriculture, Forestry and Rural Affairs Commission as the main commission. In addition, it was referred to the Environment Commission, Justice Commission and Internal Affairs Commission as secondary commissions. Two motions regarding unconstitutionality were made in the main commission, the Agriculture, Forestry and Rural Affairs Commission. According to Article 38 of the Internal Regulation, allegations of unconstitutionality were discussed in the Commission's work.

SALİHA SERA KADIGİL (Istanbul) - There was no individual qualified to negotiate in the Commission.

MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Continue) - As a result of the negotiations, the proposals were rejected because the proposal was not contrary to the Constitution and was not contrary to the text and spirit of the Constitution; This issue was clearly stated on page 17 of the commission report, and the commission report was distributed to our MPs.

Essentially, there is a three-stage evaluation in the discussions on the unconstitutionality of the law: First, the evaluation made by the Presidency of Laws and Decisions; second, the evaluation made by the Commission Presidency; The third one is the evaluation to be made through the motions to be submitted in accordance with Article 84 of the Internal Regulation while the articles of the law are being discussed. According to Article 84 of the Internal Regulation, if it is claimed that the articles are contrary to the Constitution, our Deputy Speaker of the Parliament will first put this issue to the vote before other motions are considered.

Apart from this, since our proposal was not on the agenda, our group proposal dated July 27 - since the Advisory Board could not meet - was presented to the Presidency of the Assembly. The Presidency of the Parliament placed the bill at the top of the agenda with the decision of the General Assembly of the Parliament in the 110th session regarding our proposal. Therefore, after this stage, it is not possible to make an evaluation about the unconstitutionality of the bill. The evaluation can only be made after this stage, in accordance with Article 84, and can also be made through abstract norm control and concrete norm control in the Constitutional Court after the bill becomes law.

fields.Subject: Oturum Başkanı TBMM Başkan Vekili Bekir Bozdağ’ın, 174 sıra sayılı Kanun Teklifi'nin görüşmelerine başlanıp başlanmamasına ilişkin tutumu münasebetiyle

metadata.Konu: Oturum Başkanı TBMM Başkan Vekili Bekir Bozdağ’ın, 174 sıra sayılı Kanun Teklifi'nin görüşmelerine başlanıp başlanmamasına ilişkin tutumu münasebetiyle

records.originalTurkish:
MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Tokat) - Teşekkür ederim Sayın Başkan.
Genel Kurulu ve aziz milletimizi saygıyla selamlıyorum.
Görüşmekte olduğumuz 174 sıra sayılı Köy Kanunu ile Bazı Kanunlarda Değişiklik Yapılmasına Dair Kanun Teklifi Meclis Başkanlığına sunulduğunda Meclis Başkanlığı tarafından Kanunlar ve Kararlar Başkanlığına havale edildi ve Kanunlar ve Kararlar Başkanlığı bu konuyla alakalı yani kanun teklifinin Anayasa'ya aykırı olup olmadığıyla ilgili bir değerlendirme yaptıktan sonra teklif Meclis Başkanımız tarafından ilgili komisyona havale edildi ve Komisyonumuzda yani Bayındırlık, İmar, Ulaştırma ve Turizm Komisyonunda İç Tüzük 38'inci maddeye göre Anayasa'ya aykırılık iddiasında bulunuldu; 38'inci maddeye göre de Anayasa'ya aykırılık iddiasının evleviyetle görüşülmesi gerekiyor ki bu hususta mütalaalar, müzakereler Komisyon aşamasında yapıldı ve Komisyonda Anayasa'ya aykırılık iddiası reddedildi.
Üçüncü aşama da konunun gündeme alınmasıyla alakalıdır ki Danışma Kurulu önerisi Meclisimizin Genel Kurulunun kararıyla gündeme alınmıştır. Dolayısıyla bu aşamadan sonra Anayasa'ya aykırılıkla ilgili bir konunun gündeme gelmesi söz konusu olamaz.
Biz bu konuda Sayın Başkanın tutumunun lehinde olduğumuzu belirtiyor, Genel Kurulu saygıyla selamlıyorum. (AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar)
records.englishTranslation:
MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Tokat) - Thank you, Mr. President.
I respectfully salute the General Assembly and our beloved nation.
When the Bill on Amendments to the Village Law No. 174 and Some Laws, which we are discussing, was submitted to the Presidency of the Parliament, it was referred to the Presidency of Laws and Decisions by the Presidency of the Assembly, and after the Presidency of Laws and Decisions made an evaluation on this issue, that is, whether the bill is contrary to the Constitution, the proposal was referred to the relevant commission by our Assembly Speaker, and our Commission, that is, the Public Works, Zoning, Transport and Tourism Commission, determined that it was unconstitutional according to Article 38 of the Internal Regulation. The claim was made; According to Article 38, the allegation of unconstitutionality must first be discussed, and the opinions and negotiations on this matter were held at the Commission stage, and the allegation of unconstitutionality was rejected in the Commission.
The third stage is related to putting the issue on the agenda; the recommendation of the Advisory Board was put on the agenda by the decision of the General Assembly of our Assembly. Therefore, after this stage, it is out of the question for an issue regarding unconstitutionality to be brought to the agenda.
We state that we are in favor of Mr. President's stance on this issue, and I respectfully greet the General Assembly. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

fields.Subject: Oturum Başkanı TBMM Başkanı Numan Kurtulmuş'un yoklama yapmadan birleşimi açmasıyla ilgili tutumu hakkında usul görüşmesi münasebetiyle

metadata.Konu: Oturum Başkanı TBMM Başkanı Numan Kurtulmuş'un yoklama yapmadan birleşimi açmasıyla ilgili tutumu hakkında usul görüşmesi münasebetiyle

records.originalTurkish:
MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Tokat) - Sayın Başkan, değerli milletvekilleri, Genel Kurulu ve sizleri saygıyla selamlıyorum.
Cumhuriyet Halk Partisinin itirazı üzerine bir usul tartışması açıldı. Usul tartışması açılmasına bizce gerek yok.
ADEM ÇALKIN (Kars) - Ses... Sanki ses yok gibi, sesi yükseltsinler, ses yok; ses gelmiyor, ses.
BAŞKAN - Buyurun.
MAHMUT TANAL (Şanlıurfa) - Efendim, konuşuyordu süreyi kestiniz, yeniden başlattınız, ben anlamadım bu usulsüzlüğü! Yirmi dört saniye geçti, yeniden, sıfırdan başlattınız.
MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Devamla) - Sayın Başkan değerli milletvekilleri, Genel Kurulu ve sizleri saygıyla selamlıyorum.
Öncelikle, dün 19 Mayıs 1919'un 106'ncı yıl dönümünü idrak ettik. Ben aziz milletimizin 19 Mayıs Gençlik ve Spor Bayramı'nı tebrik ediyorum. Rabb'im birliğimizi, beraberliğimizi daim eylesin.
Cumhuriyet Halk Partisinin, Meclisin Meclis Başkanı tarafından yönetilmesine bir itirazı var. Bunun kabulü mümkün değil. Her zaman muhalefet milletvekilleri şu Anayasa kitabını, İç Tüzük'ü alıp bu Meclis kürsüsünden bize doğru salladılar, buna uyulmasını istediler. Meclis İçtüzüğü'ne göre, gayet açık bir şekilde de ifade edildiği üzere, Meclisi Meclis Başkanı yürütür. Meclis Başkanlığının yönetimine itiraz dünyanın hiçbir yerinde görülmemiştir.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Dünyanın hiçbir yerinde de bu kadar yanlış yapıldığı görülmemiştir.
MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Devamla) - Yine, Meclisin gündemi Danışma Kurulunda ve gündemle ilgili alınacak kararlar da belli. Meclis gündeminde olmayan şeyleri Meclis Başkanı da Meclis Başkan Vekili de burada konuşamaz, okutturamaz, söyleyemez. "Meclis hangi hâllerde, ne iş yapacak?"
bunların tamamı İç Tüzük'te belli yani Meclisin çalışma anayasası İç Tüzük'te belli. Dolayısıyla biz usul tartışmasında Sayın Başkanın lehinde görüşümüzü bildiriyoruz.
Genel Kurulu saygıyla selamlıyorum. (AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar)
records.englishTranslation:
MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Tokat) - Mr. President, dear deputies, I respectfully greet the General Assembly and you.
A procedural discussion was opened upon the objection of the Republican People's Party. In our opinion, there is no need to open a procedural debate.
ADEM ÇALKIN (Kars) - Sound... It's like there is no sound, let them raise the sound, there is no sound; No sound, no sound.
CHAIRMAN - Here you go.
MAHMUT TANAL (Şanlıurfa) - Sir, he was talking, you cut the time and started it again, I did not understand this irregularity! Twenty-four seconds passed, you started again from scratch.
MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Continuing) - Mr. President, dear deputies, I respectfully greet the General Assembly and you.
First of all, yesterday we celebrated the 106th anniversary of May 19, 1919. I congratulate our beloved nation on May 19 Youth and Sports Day. May God preserve our unity and solidarity forever.
The Republican People's Party has an objection to the Parliament being led by the Speaker. It is impossible to accept this. All the time, opposition MPs took this Constitution book, the Internal Regulations and waved them towards us from the rostrum of this Parliament, demanding that we comply with them. According to the Internal Regulations of the Assembly, as it is clearly stated, the Speaker of the Assembly runs the Assembly. Objection to the management of the Presidency of the Parliament has not been seen anywhere in the world.
CAVİT ARI (Antalya) - Such a mistake has never been seen anywhere in the world.
MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Continue) - Again, the agenda of the Assembly is in the Advisory Board and the decisions to be taken regarding the agenda are clear. Neither the Speaker of the Parliament nor the Deputy Speaker of the Parliament can speak, have them read or say things that are not on the agenda of the Parliament. "In what circumstances will the parliament do what?"
All of these are clear in the Internal Regulations, that is, the working constitution of the Assembly is clear in the Internal Regulations. Therefore, we express our opinion in favor of Mr. President in the procedural debate.
I respectfully greet the General Assembly. (Applause from AK PARTY ranks)

metadata.Konu: 215 Sıra Sayılı Kanun Teklifi'nin Anayasa'nın 63, 169, 170'inci maddelerine aykırı olduğu ve Komisyonda İç Tüzük'ün 38'inci maddesine göre değerlendirilmediği hakkında usul görüşmesi münasebetiyle

records.originalTurkish:
MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Tokat) - Sayın Başkan, değerli milletvekilleri; Başkanlığın tutumu hakkında söz aldım. Genel Kurulu saygıyla selamlıyorum.
215 sıra sayılı
Kanun Teklifi'miz Meclis Başkanlığına sunulduğunda Kanunlar ve Kararlar Başkanlığı tarafından Anayasa'ya aykırılık konusunda bir değerlendirme yapıldı. Dolayısıyla, bu değerlendirmeden sonra da Komisyona havale edildi. Komisyonda da yapılan Anayasa'ya aykırılık itirazları İç Tüzük'ün 38'inci maddesine göre reddedildi. Bilahare 25 Haziran tarihli önergemizle bizim teklifimiz Genel Kurul gündemine alındı. Dolayısıyla, Genel Kurul gündemine alınan bu kanun teklifinin şu anda Anayasa'ya aykırılığı iddiası mümkün değil, bu konuda bir karar almamız da mümkün değil.
Bizim teklifimizde Maden Kanunu ile bazı kanunlarda değişiklik öneriliyor. Tabii, bu Genel Kurulun takdirinde. Maden Kanunu'nda ve diğer kanunlarda yapacağımız değişiklikle Türkiye'nin önümüzdeki yüzyılda, önümüzdeki yıllarda enerji bağımsızlığıyla ilgili yapacağı çalışmalara hazırlık öngörülmektedir.
Esas itibarıyla, termik santrallere karşı, nükleer santrallere karşı, HES'lere karşı, RES'lere karşı, hatta GES'lere bile karşı bir muhalefet anlayışıyla karşı karşıyayız. Dünyada termik santraller yeniden açılırken, dünyada nükleer santraller yeniden açılırken, pandemiyle beraber, Ukrayna-Rusya savaşıyla beraber ortaya çıkan enerji krizlerinde dünyada enerjiyle ilgili yeni gündemler oluşurken muhalefetin bu kanun teklifine karşı çıkmasını anlamak mümkün değil.
Şöyle arz edeyim: AK PARTİ hükûmetleri döneminde yaklaşık 105 milyon tane zeytin ağacı dikmişiz. Teklifimizle bu mevcut ağaçlardan on binde 4'ünün
taşınması söz konusu. AK PARTİ bütün zeytin ağaçlarını kesecek, hepsini ortadan kaldıracakmış gibi bir hava estiriliyor. (AK PARTİ sıralarından alkışlar) AK PARTİ iktidara geldiği zaman biz zeytinyağı üretiminde dünyada 5'inci iken bugün dünyada 2'nciyiz, sofralık zeytin üretiminde dünyada 1'inciyiz. 105 milyon tane yeni ağaç dikmişiz; 82 bin tane ağaç kesilmiyor, sadece yerlerinden taşınıyor.
Bu nedenle muhalefetin itirazlarını kabul etmiyoruz.
Genel Kurulu saygıyla selamlıyorum. (AK PARTİ sıralarından "Bravo" sesleri, alkışlar)
records.englishTranslation:
MUSTAFA ARSLAN (Tokat) - Mr. President, dear members of parliament; I took the floor about the stance of the Presidency. I respectfully greet the General Assembly.
numbered 215
When our Bill was submitted to the Presidency of the Parliament, an evaluation was made regarding its unconstitutionality by the Laws and Decisions Presidency. Therefore, after this evaluation, it was referred to the Commission. The unconstitutionality objections made in the commission were rejected according to Article 38 of the Internal Regulation. Subsequently, our proposal was included in the agenda of the General Assembly with our proposal dated June 25. Therefore, it is not possible to claim that this bill, which has been put on the agenda of the General Assembly, is unconstitutional, and it is not possible for us to take a decision on this issue.
In our proposal, changes are proposed in the Mining Law and some laws. Of course, this is at the discretion of the General Assembly. With the changes we will make in the Mining Law and other laws, it is envisaged that Türkiye will be prepared for the studies on energy independence in the coming century and the coming years.
Essentially, we are faced with a mentality of opposition against thermal power plants, against nuclear power plants, against HEPPs, against RES, and even against SPPs. It is impossible to understand the opposition's opposition to this bill while thermal power plants are being reopened in the world, nuclear power plants are being reopened in the world, and new energy-related agendas are being created in the world due to the energy crises that emerged with the pandemic and the Ukraine-Russia war.
Let me put it this way: During the AK PARTY governments period, we planted approximately 105 million olive trees. With our proposal, 4 out of ten thousand of these existing trees will be destroyed.
is to be transported. It is being created as if the AK PARTY will cut down all the olive trees and eliminate them all. (Applause from the ranks of the AK PARTY) When the AK PARTY came to power, we were 5th in the world in olive oil production, but today we are 2nd in the world and 1st in the world in table olive production. We planted 105 million new trees; 82 thousand trees are not cut down, they are just moved.
Therefore, we do not accept the objections of the opposition.
I respectfully greet the General Assembly. (Sounds of "Bravo" and applause from the AK PARTY benches)
